title: The March Begins
description: On pages 1–1, the march begins focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.
scene: On pages 1–1, the march begins focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as luffy, Zoro, Sanji, and Usopp answer Nami’s plea and march toward Arlong Park together.
summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
